title: An Act allowing the town of Williamstown to ban second generation anticoagulant rodenticides (SGARs)

abstracts.abstract: By Representative Barrett of North Adams, a petition (accompanied by bill, House, No. 5483) of John Barrett, III (by vote of the town) that the town of Williamstown be authorized to ban second generation anticoagulant rodenticides in said town.  Environment and Natural Resources.  [Local Approval Received.]

actions.description: Referred to the committee on Environment and Natural Resources

related_entities.name: committee on Environment and Natural Resources
the committee on Environment and Natural Resources

actions.description: Hearing scheduled for 07/01/2026 from 10:00 AM-12:00 PM in B-1
